Y=O and i O=10074453-(-912697)Y=Y or O end end end end end end end Y=#w return q(h)end,function(t,M)local q=X(M)local G=function(G,W,w,C,h)return Y(t,{G,W,w,C,h},M,q)end return G end,function(t,M)local q=X(M)local G=function(...)return Y(t,{...},M,q)end return G end,function(t,M)local q=X(M)local G=function(G,W)return Y(t,{G,W},M,q)end return G end,{},function(t,M)local q=X(M)local G=function(G,W,w,C)return Y(t,{G;W,w,C},M,q)end return G end,function()O=O+(836076-836075)T[O]=42060+-42059 return O end,function(t)T[t]=T[t]-(-736725+736726)if T[t]==-884328+884328 then T[t],e[t]=nil,nil end end return(c(-362776+14083747,{}))(q(h))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[M(84914+-60687)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
